phrases.en: Every morning, Kate waters her houseplants.
phrases.zh: 每天早上，凯特给她的室内植物浇水。

phrases.en: First, she touches the dry soil with her finger.
phrases.zh: 首先，她用手指触摸干燥的土壤。

phrases.en: She checks each pot to see which plant is thirsty.
phrases.zh: 她检查每个花盆，看看哪株植物缺水。

phrases.en: She carries the empty watering can to the sink.
phrases.zh: 她把空的浇水壶拿到水槽边。

phrases.en: She turns on the tap and fills it slowly with cool water.
phrases.zh: 她打开水龙头，慢慢地往壶里灌满凉水。

phrases.en: Then she carefully pours water onto the dry soil.
phrases.zh: 然后她小心地把水浇到干燥的土壤上。

phrases.en: She gives each thirsty pot a good drink.
phrases.zh: 她让每个缺水的花盆都喝个饱。

phrases.en: She moves the small fern away from the sunny window.
phrases.zh: 她把那株小蕨类植物从向阳的窗边挪开。

phrases.en: She gently pulls off the yellow leaves.
phrases.zh: 她轻轻地摘掉发黄的叶子。

phrases.en: Sometimes a little water spills over the edge.
phrases.zh: 有时会有一点水从盆边溢出来。

phrases.en: She wipes up the wet spills with a soft cloth.
phrases.zh: 她用一块软布把洒出的水擦干净。

phrases.en: Finally, she puts the watering can back on the shelf.
phrases.zh: 最后，她把浇水壶放回架子上。
